nav.title: DocsGuard
nav.subtitle: Secure it before you share it
nav.privacy_banner: Your documents are processed locally on your device without the use of servers. We do not store or access your data. Your privacy is entirely in your hands.

login.title: Welcome Back
login.subtitle: Sign in to protect your documents locally.
login.privacy_note: Your credentials are never stored. We only use Google for identification.
login.footer_privacy: By signing in, you agree to our Privacy Policy

upload_section.select_doc: Select a document to begin. Your files are processed locally and never uploaded to any server.
upload_section.privacy_note: Your files are processed locally and never uploaded to any server.
upload_section.crop_hint: Drag corners to crop the document

subscription_section.pro_subtitle: Unlock the full power of privacy

info_card.description: DocsGuard uses browser-based canvas rendering to apply watermarks. This means your data never leaves your computer, ensuring 100% privacy.
info_card.privacy_notice: Your documents are processed locally on your device without the use of servers. We do not store or access your data. Your privacy is entirely in your hands.

preview_modal.all_pages_note: Watermark will be applied to all {numPages} pages upon download
preview_modal.download_note: Previewing the first page as a sample. Download to apply to all pages.

errors.page_limit_description: This document has {count} pages. Please upgrade to Pro Plan to watermark documents with more than 3 pages.
